summary: Evidence add now returns next_recommendation and agent_next, so agents can route after recording evidence instead of guessing whether to continue a gap, review architecture, report completion risk, or start the next loop.

sources.label: npx vitest run test/core.test.js -t 'high-risk criteria require strong evidence before passing'
sources.command: npx vitest run test/core.test.js -t 'high-risk criteria require strong evidence before passing'

sources.label: npx vitest run test/cli-commands.test.js -t 'evidence add command module records flexible reviewable sources'
sources.command: npx vitest run test/cli-commands.test.js -t 'evidence add command module records flexible reviewable sources'

reviewability: Run the listed tests and inspect evidence add JSON for next_recommendation and data.agent_next after evidence writes.
limitations: This verifies deterministic routing in the evidence command; downstream agents still need to follow the returned Skill.
